ddt:Target.Name: N_PZ1A_PEB_UDS_Sharp0_20190822_v1.6
ddt:Target.Description:
[N] 2019/08/22 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Initial Creation. <ItemList: PZ1A_PEB_ItemList_N.xlsx>
V1: Addition of Genereic ECU name = INVME xBC Activation Deposit in official Central Database file from Nissan: N_PZ1A_PEB_UDS_Sharp0_20190822 Passed DDT2000 Check Tools and corrected: DTCFailureType.ManufacturerOrSupplier = Numeric StatusOfDTC added in teh request systemSupplierIdentifier passed to 4 bytes as autoident systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber on 32 bystes as autoident systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber on 32 bytes as autoident devices: removal of (TDB) to respect the lenght rulle and shortenen Uxxxx DTCs unit degC replaced by °C Nm" to N.m Replaced l/min Units and put it in the name of all the impacted DIDs Replaced the count Unit from DID DataRead.FFD_$F0D1_#004_bit0_DTC count and made it: DataRead.FFD_$F0D1_#004_bit0_DTC (count) Normalise operations on DTC, Requests and DIDs sheet Removel of double spaces from DID & Requests names
v1.6 Correction of Vehicle application xCB instead of xBC

Item.Text: [P0BFD](TBD)Drive Motor "A" Phase U-V-W Current Sensor Correlation
[P0DA8](TBD)Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage/Drive Motor "A" Inverter Voltage Correlation
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
[P0A00]Motor Electronics Coolant Temperature Sensor Circuit_'Circuit Short To Ground
[P0A05]Motor Electronics Coolant Pump "A" Control_'Bus Signal / Message Failure
[P0A2A]Drive Motor "A" Temperature Sensor Circuit_'Circuit Short To Ground
[P0A78]Drive Motor "A" Inverter Performance_'Circuit Voltage Below Threshold
[P0A8B]14 Volt Power Module System Voltage_'System Voltage Low
[P0AED]Drive Motor Inverter Temperature Sensor "A" Circuit_'Circuit Short To Ground
[P0BE5]Drive Motor "A" Phase U Current Sensor_'Circuit Voltage Out of Range
[P0BE9]Drive Motor "A" Phase V Current Sensor_'Circuit Voltage Out of Range
[P0BED]Drive Motor "A" Phase W Current Sensor_'Circuit Voltage Out of Range
[P0BFD]Drive Motor "A" Phase U-V-W Current Sensor Correlation
[P0C0B]Drive Motor "A" Inverter Power Supply_'General Electrical Failure
[P0CBC]Drive Motor "A" Coolant Temperature Sensor"_'Circuit Short To Ground
[P0CC1]Drive Motor "A" Coolant Pump Control_System Internal Failure
[P0D2D]Drive Motor "A" Inverter Voltage Sensor_'Circuit Voltage Above Threshold
[P0DA8]Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage/Drive Motor "A" Inverter Voltage Correlation
[P161F]Stay protected for Key Check error with HFM_Signal Plausibility Failure
[P2E28]Drive Motor "A" Excitation Current Sensor_Circuit Voltage Out of Range
[P2E2B]Drive Motor "A" Excitation Current_'Circuit Short To Ground
[P3081]Resolver offset memory diagnosis Data Memory Failure
[U2143]Com With Hyb Powertrain Control Module Alive/Seq Counter Incorrect/Not Updated
[U2144]Com With Bat Energy Ctrl Module "A" Alive/Seq Counter Incorrect/Not Updated
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: DataRead.FFD_$100F_#004_bit0_(TBD)Raw rotor position resolver angular position measurement
DataRead.FFD_$1012_#004_bit0_(TBD)Final SPT d axis current request
DataRead.FFD_$1013_#004_bit0_(TBD)Final SPT q axis current request
DataRead.FFD_$1027_#004_bit0_(TBD)Wake up sleep command from HEVC
DataRead.FFD_$7136_#004_bit0_(TBD)Final value (after filtering) of Emotor torque estimation, based on measured current values

Item.Text: (TBD)Nsx_auto_diag_cal_ofs - calage de l'offset des courants de phase(05h)
(TBD)Nsx_stc_uex_brak : "Unexpected braking" is detected by the "static control strategy"(03h)
(TBD)Nsx_stc_uex_acc_neg : "Unexpected acceleration" in case of negative torque request is detected by the "static control strategy"(04h)
(TBD)Nsx_stc_uex_acc : "Unexpected acceleration" is detected by the "static control strategy"(05h)
(TBD)Nsx_dyn_uex_acc : "Unexpected acceleration" is detected by the "dynamic control strategy"(06h)
(TBD)Nsx_stc_obrak : "Over braking" is detected by the "static control strategy"(07h)
(TBD)Nsx_dyn_obrak : "Over braking" or "Unexpected braking" are detected by the "dynamic control strategy"(08h)
(TBD)Nsx_stc_lack_motr : "Lack of motricity" is detected by the "static control strategy"(09h)
(TBD)Nsx_dyn_lack_motr : "Lack of motricity" is detected by the "dynamic control strategy"(0Ah)
(TBD)Nsx_stc_rege_tq_loss : "Loss of regenerative torque" is detected by the "static control strategy" (0Bh)
(TBD)Nsx_dyn_rege_tq_loss : "Loss of regenerative torque" is detected by the "dynamic control strategy"(0Ch)
(TBD)Nsx_ov_der_dfl : Non zero generated torque detected in case of overvoltage(0Dh)
(TBD)Nsx_term_der_dfl : Non limited torque detected in case of rotor overtemperature (rotor temperature = 100%)(0Eh)

Data.Name: DataRead.FFD_$7140_#004_bit0_(TBD)Combination of inverter, Excitation, PCB, MC and DRI temperatures, so in %
DataRead.FFD_$7141_#004_bit0_(TBD)Combination of rotor and stator temperatures, so in %
DataRead.FFD_$7142_#004_bit0_(TBD)The water temperature produced by the Rectifier

Item.Text: (TBD)1 :+AM648:AM657 Nsx_gc_md_03 - GC-MD03 : minor failure whithout impact on traction(01h)
(TBD)7 : Nsx_gc_md_01d - GC-MD01d : Active short circuit on low arms(07h)
(TBD)8 : Nsx_gc_md_01e - GC-MD01e : Active short circuit on high arms(08h)
(TBD)11 : Nsx_dfl_chr_md - inconsistency between PWMs and downgraded mode (0Bh)
(TBD)7 : Nsx_gc_md_01d - GC-MD01d : Active short circuit on low arms(07h)
(TBD)8 : Nsx_gc_md_01e - GC-MD01e : Active short circuit on high arms(08h)
(TBD)11 : Nsx_dfl_chr_md - inconsistency between PWMs and downgraded mode (0Bh)

Data.Name: DataRead.FFD_$7147_#004_bit0_(TBD)Validity status of the rotor electrical angular position

Item.Text: (TBD)1 : Nsx_dgt_emot_psn_chk_fail: Failure of the functional position acquisition(01h)
(TBD)2 : Nsx_dgt_emot_psn_chk_fail_sfty: Failure of the safety position acquisition(02h)
(TBD)3 : Nsx_dgt_emot_psn_chk_full_fail: Double failure or incoherency between functional and safety positions(03h)

Data.Name: DataRead.FFD_$7148_#004_bit0_(TBD)Combinated current value on the HV Network of Inverter and Excitation
DataRead.FFD_$714E_#004_bit0_(TBD)Context data 1 for DTC_Reset : 16bits SeedBreaker called on reset request
DataRead.FFD_$714F_#004_bit0_(TBD)Vtx_TaskMaxDurationIT_A[12] = max duration of 100us task, coded on 32 bits
DataRead.FFD_$7150_#004_bit0_(TBD)Vtx_TaskMaxDurationIT_A[3] = max duration of 10ms task, coded on 32 bits

Item.Text: (TBD)Bits 0 to 3 : tracebility variable (Detail dans le fichier TracabiliteExecutionPourINV600.doc )(00h)
(TBD)Bits 0 to 3 : tracebility variable (Detail dans le fichier TracabiliteExecutionPourINV600.doc )(01h)
(TBD)Bits 0 to 3 : tracebility variable (Deail dans le fichier TracabiliteExecutionPourINV600.doc )(02h)
(TBD)Bits 0 to 3 : tracebility variable (Detail dans le fichier TracabiliteExecutionPourINV600.doc )(03h)
(TBD)Bits 12 to 15 : Other than ESR1 resets counter (range 0to10)(0Ch)
(TBD)Bits 12 to 15 : Other than ESR1 resets counter (range 0to10)(0Dh)
(TBD)Bits 12 to 15 : Other than ESR1 resets counter (range 0to10)(0Eh)

Data.Name: DataRead.FFD_$7153_#004_bit0_(TBD)Stator current information stored in non erasable memory
DataRead.FFD_$7157_#004_bit0_(TBD)Inverter temperature sensor 1 stored in non erasable memory
DataRead.FFD_$7159_#004_bit0_(TBD)Rotor mechanical rotation speed (for safety monitoring)
DataRead.FFD_$715A_#004_bit0_(TBD)First interlock state according to the table below
DataRead.FFD_$715B_#004_bit0_(TBD)Second interlock state according to the table below
DataRead.FFD_$715E_#004_bit0_(TBD)SPI copy for FPGa of DeactivationStatus sent on CAN

Item.Text: (TBD)1 : Nsx_hevc_dact_volt_avl - Deactivation Request Torque interruption request / voltage mode allowed(01h)
(TBD)2 : Nsx_hevc_dact_ztq - Deactivation Request Torque interruption request / zero-torque regulation all(02h)
(TBD)3 : Nsx_hevc_dact_imd_off - Deactivation Request Torque interruption request / immediate shut-off(03h)
(TBD)15 : Nsx_hevc_dact_uv - Deactivation Request Reserved for safety(0Fh)

Data.Name: DataRead.FFD_$716C_#004_bit0_(TBD)Estimated oil temperature of heating exchange output

DataRead.FFD_$7285_#004_bit0_(TBD)Status flag default of SPI link from smartcoder to micro

Item.Text: (TBD)D1: Phase error exceeds phase lock range (01h)
(TBD)D4: Sine/cosine inputs exceed DOS mismatch threshold (04h)
(TBD)D5: Sine/cosine inputs exceed DOS overrange threshold (05h)

Data.Name: DataRead_$7007_#004_bit0_(TBD)Measured stator current on phase U
DataRead_$701C_#004_bit0_(TBDSaved rotor position offset learning + CRC written by diag tool
DataRead_$7021_#004_bit0_(TBD)Saved resistance rotor learning + CRC written by diag tool

Item.Text: (TBD)1 : Nsx_auto_diag_apc_off - Auto diag without apc allowed(01h)
(TBD)2 : Nsx_auto_diag_apc_on - Auto diag with apc allowed(02h)
(TBD)5 : Nsx_auto_diag_bsw_wait - auto diag basic software waiting(05h)
(TBD)6 : Nsx_auto_diag_bsw_tout - auto diag basic software time out (06h)
(TBD) Nsx_hv_ok - HV voltage comparison OK, No failure(01h)
(TBD)Nsx_hv_nw_loss - HV Network Loss or false relay status information(05h)
(TBD)Nsx_hv_bat_sfty_dfl - HV battery safety mode 1 request (safety flag)(06h)
(TBD)3 : Nsx_stc_uex_brak : "Unexpected braking" is detected by the "static control strategy"(03h)
(TBD)4 : Nsx_stc_uex_acc_neg : "Unexpected acceleration" in case of negative torque request is detected by the "static control strategy"(04h)
(TBD)5 : Nsx_stc_uex_acc : "Unexpected acceleration" is detected by the "static control strategy"(05h)
(TBD)6 : Nsx_dyn_uex_acc : "Unexpected acceleration" is detected by the "dynamic control strategy"(06h)
(TBD)7 : Nsx_stc_obrak : "Over braking" is detected by the "static control strategy"(07h)
(TBD)8 :Nsx_dyn_obrak : "Over braking" or "Unexpected braking" are detected by the "dynamic control strategy"(08h)
(TBD)9: :Nsx_stc_lack_motr : "Lack of motricity" is detected by the "static control strategy"(09h)
(TBD)10 : Nsx_dyn_lack_motr : "Lack of motricity" is detected by the "dynamic control strategy"(0Ah)
(TBD)11 : Nsx_stc_rege_tq_loss : "Loss of regenerative torque" is detected by the "static control strategy" (0Bh)
(TBD)12 : Nsx_dyn_rege_tq_loss : "Loss of regenerative torque" is detected by the "dynamic control strategy"(0Ch)
(TBD)13 : Nsx_ov_der_dfl : Non zero generated torque detected in case of overvoltage(0Dh)
(TBD)14 : Nsx_term_der_dfl : Non limited torque detected in case of rotor overtemperature (rotor temperature = 100%)(0Eh)
(TBD) Nsx_gc_md_01d - GC-MD01d : Active short circuit on low arms(07h)
(TBD)Nsx_gc_md_01e - GC-MD01e : Active short circuit on high arms(08h)
(TBD)Nsx_dfl_chr_md - inconsistency between PWMs and downgraded mode (0Bh)
(TBD)Nsx_gc_md_03 - GC-MD03 : minor failure whithout impact on traction(01h)
(TBD) Nsx_gc_md_01d - GC-MD01d : Active short circuit on low arms(07h)
(TBD) Nsx_gc_md_01e - GC-MD01e : Active short circuit on high arms(08h)
(TBD)Nsx_dfl_chr_md - inconsistency between PWMs and downgraded mode (0Bh)
(TBD)Nsx_dgt_emot_psn_chk_fail: Failure of the functional position acquisition(01h)
(TBD)Nsx_dgt_emot_psn_chk_fail_sfty: Failure of the safety position acquisition(02h)
(TBD)Nsx_dgt_emot_psn_chk_full_fail: Double failure or incoherency between functional and safety positions(03h)
(TBD)Nsx_byp_tq_mod - TQ setpoint and torque mode bypass(03h)
(TBD) Nsx_byp_rgl_dyc - RGL duty cycle bypass (in PWM)(08h)
(TBD)Nsx_byp_volt_emul_psn - Voltage control and speed bypass and position emulation(09h)
(TBD)Nsx_byp_i_req_emul_psn - Current request and speed bypass and position emulation(0Ah)
(TBD)Nsx_i_f_chk_dfl_1 : both currents are out of range OR the 2 currents are inconsistent (difference > thershold)(01h)
(TBD)Nsx_i_f_chk_dfl_2 : current from sensor 1 (Vxx_i_f_1) is out of range(02h)
(TBD)Nsx_i_f_chk_dfl_3 : current from sensor 2 (Vxx_i_f_2) is out of range(03h)
(TBD)Nsx_no_i_mot_ph_chk_dfl : the summ of the 3 currents is close to zero (< threshold)(00h)
(TBD)Nsx_i_mot_ph_chk_dfl_1 : the summ of the 3 currents isn't close to zero (>threshold) OR at least 2 of the currents are out of range(01h)
(TBD)Nsx_i_mot_ph_chk_dfl_2 : current from sensor 1 (Vxx_i_mot_ph_1) is out of range(02h)
(TBD)Nsx_i_mot_ph_chk_dfl_3 : current from sensor 2 (Vxx_i_mot_ph_2) is out of range(03h)
(TBD)Nsx_i_mot_ph_chk_dfl_4 : current from sensor 3 (Vxx_i_mot_ph_3) is out of range(04h)
(TBD) Failure - No reliable position information to compute rotor speed or incoherency between functional and safety rotation speeds(01h)
(TBD)Nsx_hevc_dact_volt_avl - Deactivation Request Torque interruption request / voltage mode allowed(01h)
(TBD)Nsx_hevc_dact_ztq - Deactivation Request Torque interruption request / zero-torque regulation all(02h)
(TBD)Nsx_hevc_dact_imd_off - Deactivation Request Torque interruption request / immediate shut-off(03h)
(TBD) Nsx_hevc_dact_uv - Deactivation Request Reserved for safety(0Fh)

[P0A00]Motor Electronics Coolant Temperature Sensor Circuit_'Circuit Short To Ground
[P0A05]Motor Electronics Coolant Pump "A" Control_'Bus Signal / Message Failure
[P0A0A]High Voltage System Interlock "A"_General Electrical Failure

[P0A3F]Drive Motor "A" Position Sensor_'System Internal Failure
[P0A51]Drive Motor "A" Current Sensor_General Electrical Failure
[P0A78]Drive Motor "A" Inverter Performance_'Circuit Voltage Below Threshold
[P0A8B]14 Volt Power Module System Voltage_'System Voltage Low
[P0AED]Drive Motor Inverter Temperature Sensor "A" Circuit_'Circuit Short To Ground
[P0BE5]Drive Motor "A" Phase U Current Sensor_'Circuit Voltage Out of Range
[P0BE9]Drive Motor "A" Phase V Current Sensor_'Circuit Voltage Out of Range
[P0BED]Drive Motor "A" Phase W Current Sensor_'Circuit Voltage Out of Range

[P0BFF]Drive Motor "A" Current_Circuit Short To Ground
[P0C0B]Drive Motor "A" Inverter Power Supply_'General Electrical Failure
[P0CBC]Drive Motor "A" Coolant Temperature Sensor"_'Circuit Short To Ground
[P0CC1]Drive Motor "A" Coolant Pump Control_System Internal Failure
[P0D2D]Drive Motor "A" Inverter Voltage Sensor_'Circuit Voltage Above Threshold
